records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a gap between the swing and the actual slash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a gap between the swing and the actual slash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a gap between the swing and the actual slash.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An ability specialized for ambushes. Does your blade cut the immediate future itself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An ability specialized for ambushes. Does your blade cut the immediate future itself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An ability specialized for ambushes. Does your blade cut the immediate future itself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You figured it out at a glance?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You figured it out at a glance?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You figured it out at a glance?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what now? What can you even do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what now? What can you even do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what now? What can you even do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you've awakened Divinity and manifested a rather unusual ability, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you've awakened Divinity and manifested a rather unusual ability, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you've awakened Divinity and manifested a rather unusual ability, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're still sloppy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're still sloppy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're still sloppy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I leave you alive here, you'll surely become Mother's equal someday.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I leave you alive here, you'll surely become Mother's equal someday.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I leave you alive here, you'll surely become Mother's equal someday.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke. What is it, Sis?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke. What is it, Sis?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke. What is it, Sis?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've already got a kid this big...? Oho, looks like you've had some fun, huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've already got a kid this big...? Oho, looks like you've had some fun, huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've already got a kid this big...? Oho, looks like you've had some fun, huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Useless chatter. Suffocate and die right here...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Useless chatter. Suffocate and die right here...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Useless chatter. Suffocate and die right here...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gyaaaaaaah!! Hey, save me! Hurry, save me already!! Burneeetttttt...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gyaaaaaaah!! Hey, save me! Hurry, save me already!! Burneeetttttt...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gyaaaaaaah!! Hey, save me! Hurry, save me already!! Burneeetttttt...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate Liona's gonna die! She's really gonna dieee...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate Liona's gonna die! She's really gonna dieee...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate Liona's gonna die! She's really gonna dieee...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, how ridiculous...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, how ridiculous...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, how ridiculous...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think you're worthy of facing me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think you're worthy of facing me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think you're worthy of facing me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, your opponent is me! So let him go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, your opponent is me! So let him go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, your opponent is me! So let him go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care about that Fragment, but I won't let Liona die like this...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care about that Fragment, but I won't let Liona die like this...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care about that Fragment, but I won't let Liona die like this...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I carry this shield!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I carry this shield!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I carry this shield!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You okay, rookie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You okay, rookie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You okay, rookie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I seriously thought I was dead...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I seriously thought I was dead...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I seriously thought I was dead...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You scumbag! You said I was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>! Then do some special surveilling already...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You scumbag! You said I was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>! Then do some special surveilling already...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You scumbag! You said I was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>! Then do some special surveilling already...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you! Do you like this dullard or something? You want me to let you grope her chest?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you! Do you like this dullard or something? You want me to let you grope her chest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you! Do you like this dullard or something? You want me to let you grope her chest?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I saved you for nothing, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I saved you for nothing, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I saved you for nothing, didn't I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while, Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was just looking for someone to play with. This works out nicely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was just looking for someone to play with. This works out nicely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was just looking for someone to play with. This works out nicely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Care to play with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Care to play with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Care to play with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hands off my agent, monster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hands off my agent, monster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hands off my agent, monster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, jealous? You've gotten cuter since I last saw you, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, jealous? You've gotten cuter since I last saw you, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, jealous? You've gotten cuter since I last saw you, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now I wonder... What does jealousy taste like...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now I wonder... What does jealousy taste like...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now I wonder... What does jealousy taste like...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edel, now is our chance while the Knight of the Lake is wounded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Edel, now is our chance while the Knight of the Lake is wounded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Edel, now is our chance while the Knight of the Lake is wounded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have her devour the Disturber.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have her devour the Disturber.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have her devour the Disturber.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! Oh my, I almost forgot about Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! Oh my, I almost forgot about Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! Oh my, I almost forgot about Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so? How convenient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so? How convenient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so? How convenient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've been aiming for you all along!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've been aiming for you all along!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've been aiming for you all along!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meitner...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meitner...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meitner...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's useless! I'll block your chains from here...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's useless! I'll block your chains from here...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's useless! I'll block your chains from here...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, insolent whelp!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, insolent whelp!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, insolent whelp!

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now, allow me to express my thanks as the Chief, MacCready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now, allow me to express my thanks as the Chief, MacCready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now, allow me to express my thanks as the Chief, MacCready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or should I address you as the President now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or should I address you as the President now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or should I address you as the President now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Either is fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Either is fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Either is fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stopping the faction takes priority right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stopping the faction takes priority right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stopping the faction takes priority right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, your words are correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, your words are correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, your words are correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We failed to protect the city, but even so, we must keep fighting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We failed to protect the city, but even so, we must keep fighting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We failed to protect the city, but even so, we must keep fighting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To see our justice carried through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To see our justice carried through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To see our justice carried through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Zodiac Knights, who temporarily withdrew from the front line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Zodiac Knights, who temporarily withdrew from the front line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Zodiac Knights, who temporarily withdrew from the front line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hereby announce to all that we have returned to this battlefield as the vanguard...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hereby announce to all that we have returned to this battlefield as the vanguard...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hereby announce to all that we have returned to this battlefield as the vanguard...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is everyone all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is everyone all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is everyone all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not over yet, is it? We came to help!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not over yet, is it? We came to help!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not over yet, is it? We came to help!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Module armor change! Triaina Plan!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Module armor change! Triaina Plan!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Module armor change! Triaina Plan!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apocalyptic massive weapon of destruction, arriving on site! I'm here to end this city's war!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apocalyptic massive weapon of destruction, arriving on site! I'm here to end this city's war!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apocalyptic massive weapon of destruction, arriving on site! I'm here to end this city's war!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously! What on earth just happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously! What on earth just happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously! What on earth just happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I came to, I was three kilometers away from the operation zone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I came to, I was three kilometers away from the operation zone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I came to, I was three kilometers away from the operation zone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The operation failed. And then there was an explosion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The operation failed. And then there was an explosion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The operation failed. And then there was an explosion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But most of the personnel suddenly vanished, so we were able to avoid it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But most of the personnel suddenly vanished, so we were able to avoid it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But most of the personnel suddenly vanished, so we were able to avoid it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Vanished? The Hollow God disappeared all of a sudden too, didn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Vanished? The Hollow God disappeared all of a sudden too, didn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vanished? The Hollow God disappeared all of a sudden too, didn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Miss Regina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Miss Regina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Miss Regina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it weren't for you, most of us here would have been killed or gravely injured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it weren't for you, most of us here would have been killed or gravely injured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it weren't for you, most of us here would have been killed or gravely injured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You flatter me, Lamda.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You flatter me, Lamda.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You flatter me, Lamda.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maintaining order within my estate is the President's duty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maintaining order within my estate is the President's duty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maintaining order within my estate is the President's duty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't even properly protect my own estate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't even properly protect my own estate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't even properly protect my own estate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this...?! An earthquake...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this...?! An earthquake...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this...?! An earthquake...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like we're reaching the limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like we're reaching the limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like we're reaching the limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roots extending from the Grand Dimension Crevice are breaking through the ground here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roots extending from the Grand Dimension Crevice are breaking through the ground here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roots extending from the Grand Dimension Crevice are breaking through the ground here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This entire area will soon be contaminated by Qlipha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This entire area will soon be contaminated by Qlipha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This entire area will soon be contaminated by Qlipha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother, forgive me for saying this, but we have no chance of victory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother, forgive me for saying this, but we have no chance of victory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother, forgive me for saying this, but we have no chance of victory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would be wise to withdraw here and prepare for what comes next.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would be wise to withdraw here and prepare for what comes next.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would be wise to withdraw here and prepare for what comes next.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it's unfortunate, but it can't be helped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it's unfortunate, but it can't be helped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it's unfortunate, but it can't be helped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You need time to recover your wounds, my knight, and I've expended more Fragments than I should have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You need time to recover your wounds, my knight, and I've expended more Fragments than I should have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You need time to recover your wounds, my knight, and I've expended more Fragments than I should have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I thought the timing was perfect...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I thought the timing was perfect...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I thought the timing was perfect...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems we are still lacking to face Mother head-on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems we are still lacking to face Mother head-on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems we are still lacking to face Mother head-on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And there was an entirely unexpected <color=#ffd34c>variable</color> as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And there was an entirely unexpected <color=#ffd34c>variable</color> as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And there was an entirely unexpected <color=#ffd34c>variable</color> as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you thinking of running away, Disturber?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you thinking of running away, Disturber?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you thinking of running away, Disturber?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think I'd just stand by and watch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think I'd just stand by and watch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think I'd just stand by and watch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, aren't you being a bit overconfident when you've already expended so much power yourself, Mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, aren't you being a bit overconfident when you've already expended so much power yourself, Mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, aren't you being a bit overconfident when you've already expended so much power yourself, Mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then devouring you here would solve that problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then devouring you here would solve that problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then devouring you here would solve that problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, I'll stake everything I have to drag you all down with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, I'll stake everything I have to drag you all down with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, I'll stake everything I have to drag you all down with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How amusing. Do you really think I couldn't handle that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How amusing. Do you really think I couldn't handle that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How amusing. Do you really think I couldn't handle that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough, Edel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough, Edel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough, Edel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Miss Regina...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Miss Regina...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Miss Regina...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not talk back to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not talk back to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not talk back to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do not wish for any more sacrifices within my estate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do not wish for any more sacrifices within my estate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do not wish for any more sacrifices within my estate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I would appreciate it if the faction withdrew at this point as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I would appreciate it if the faction withdrew at this point as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I would appreciate it if the faction withdrew at this point as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, wasn't your goal to accelerate the omen phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, wasn't your goal to accelerate the omen phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, wasn't your goal to accelerate the omen phenomenon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If so, you've already achieved what you wanted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If so, you've already achieved what you wanted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If so, you've already achieved what you wanted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected of you, Regina. A wise decision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected of you, Regina. A wise decision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected of you, Regina. A wise decision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, bye-bye, everyone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well then, bye-bye, everyone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well then, bye-bye, everyone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you win the next Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you win the next Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you win the next Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I carry this shield!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I carry this shield!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You okay, rookie?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You okay, rookie?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You okay, rookie?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I seriously thought I was dead...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I seriously thought I was dead...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I seriously thought I was dead...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You scumbag! You said I was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>! Then do some special surveilling already...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You scumbag! You said I was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>! Then do some special surveilling already...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You scumbag! You said I was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>! Then do some special surveilling already...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you! Do you like this dullard or something? You want me to let you grope her chest?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you! Do you like this dullard or something? You want me to let you grope her chest?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you! Do you like this dullard or something? You want me to let you grope her chest?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I saved you for nothing, didn't I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I saved you for nothing, didn't I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I saved you for nothing, didn't I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while, Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was just looking for someone to play with. This works out nicely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was just looking for someone to play with. This works out nicely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was just looking for someone to play with. This works out nicely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Care to play with me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Care to play with me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Care to play with me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hands off my agent, monster.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hands off my agent, monster.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hands off my agent, monster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, jealous? You've gotten cuter since I last saw you, Chief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, jealous? You've gotten cuter since I last saw you, Chief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, jealous? You've gotten cuter since I last saw you, Chief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now I wonder... What does jealousy taste like...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now I wonder... What does jealousy taste like...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now I wonder... What does jealousy taste like...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Edel, now is our chance while the Knight of the Lake is wounded.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Edel, now is our chance while the Knight of the Lake is wounded.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Edel, now is our chance while the Knight of the Lake is wounded.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have her devour the Disturber.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have her devour the Disturber.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have her devour the Disturber.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! Oh my, I almost forgot about Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! Oh my, I almost forgot about Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! Oh my, I almost forgot about Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so? How convenient.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so? How convenient.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so? How convenient.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've been aiming for you all along!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've been aiming for you all along!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've been aiming for you all along!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Meitner...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Meitner...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Meitner...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's useless! I'll block your chains from here...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's useless! I'll block your chains from here...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's useless! I'll block your chains from here...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, insolent whelp!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, insolent whelp!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, insolent whelp!

root.m_Talk_ENG: For now, allow me to express my thanks as the Chief, MacCready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For now, allow me to express my thanks as the Chief, MacCready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For now, allow me to express my thanks as the Chief, MacCready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or should I address you as the President now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or should I address you as the President now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or should I address you as the President now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Either is fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Either is fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Either is fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stopping the faction takes priority right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stopping the faction takes priority right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stopping the faction takes priority right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, your words are correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, your words are correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, your words are correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We failed to protect the city, but even so, we must keep fighting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We failed to protect the city, but even so, we must keep fighting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We failed to protect the city, but even so, we must keep fighting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To see our justice carried through.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To see our justice carried through.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To see our justice carried through.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Zodiac Knights, who temporarily withdrew from the front line.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Zodiac Knights, who temporarily withdrew from the front line.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Zodiac Knights, who temporarily withdrew from the front line.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hereby announce to all that we have returned to this battlefield as the vanguard...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hereby announce to all that we have returned to this battlefield as the vanguard...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hereby announce to all that we have returned to this battlefield as the vanguard...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is everyone all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is everyone all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is everyone all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not over yet, is it? We came to help!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not over yet, is it? We came to help!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not over yet, is it? We came to help!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Module armor change! Triaina Plan!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Module armor change! Triaina Plan!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Module armor change! Triaina Plan!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Apocalyptic massive weapon of destruction, arriving on site! I'm here to end this city's war!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Apocalyptic massive weapon of destruction, arriving on site! I'm here to end this city's war!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Apocalyptic massive weapon of destruction, arriving on site! I'm here to end this city's war!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously! What on earth just happened?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously! What on earth just happened?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously! What on earth just happened?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I came to, I was three kilometers away from the operation zone!
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I came to, I was three kilometers away from the operation zone!
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I came to, I was three kilometers away from the operation zone!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The operation failed. And then there was an explosion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The operation failed. And then there was an explosion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The operation failed. And then there was an explosion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But most of the personnel suddenly vanished, so we were able to avoid it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But most of the personnel suddenly vanished, so we were able to avoid it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But most of the personnel suddenly vanished, so we were able to avoid it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Vanished? The Hollow God disappeared all of a sudden too, didn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Vanished? The Hollow God disappeared all of a sudden too, didn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Vanished? The Hollow God disappeared all of a sudden too, didn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Miss Regina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Miss Regina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Miss Regina.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it weren't for you, most of us here would have been killed or gravely injured.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it weren't for you, most of us here would have been killed or gravely injured.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it weren't for you, most of us here would have been killed or gravely injured.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You flatter me, Lamda.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You flatter me, Lamda.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You flatter me, Lamda.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maintaining order within my estate is the President's duty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maintaining order within my estate is the President's duty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maintaining order within my estate is the President's duty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems I...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems I...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems I...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't even properly protect my own estate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't even properly protect my own estate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't even properly protect my own estate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is this...?! An earthquake...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is this...?! An earthquake...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is this...?! An earthquake...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like we're reaching the limit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like we're reaching the limit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like we're reaching the limit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Roots extending from the Grand Dimension Crevice are breaking through the ground here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Roots extending from the Grand Dimension Crevice are breaking through the ground here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Roots extending from the Grand Dimension Crevice are breaking through the ground here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This entire area will soon be contaminated by Qlipha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This entire area will soon be contaminated by Qlipha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This entire area will soon be contaminated by Qlipha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother, forgive me for saying this, but we have no chance of victory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother, forgive me for saying this, but we have no chance of victory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother, forgive me for saying this, but we have no chance of victory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would be wise to withdraw here and prepare for what comes next.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It would be wise to withdraw here and prepare for what comes next.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It would be wise to withdraw here and prepare for what comes next.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it's unfortunate, but it can't be helped.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it's unfortunate, but it can't be helped.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it's unfortunate, but it can't be helped.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You need time to recover your wounds, my knight, and I've expended more Fragments than I should have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You need time to recover your wounds, my knight, and I've expended more Fragments than I should have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You need time to recover your wounds, my knight, and I've expended more Fragments than I should have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I thought the timing was perfect...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I thought the timing was perfect...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I thought the timing was perfect...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems we are still lacking to face Mother head-on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems we are still lacking to face Mother head-on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems we are still lacking to face Mother head-on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And there was an entirely unexpected <color=#ffd34c>variable</color> as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And there was an entirely unexpected <color=#ffd34c>variable</color> as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And there was an entirely unexpected <color=#ffd34c>variable</color> as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you thinking of running away, Disturber?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you thinking of running away, Disturber?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you thinking of running away, Disturber?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think I'd just stand by and watch?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think I'd just stand by and watch?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think I'd just stand by and watch?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, aren't you being a bit overconfident when you've already expended so much power yourself, Mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, aren't you being a bit overconfident when you've already expended so much power yourself, Mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, aren't you being a bit overconfident when you've already expended so much power yourself, Mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then devouring you here would solve that problem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then devouring you here would solve that problem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then devouring you here would solve that problem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, I'll stake everything I have to drag you all down with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, I'll stake everything I have to drag you all down with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, I'll stake everything I have to drag you all down with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How amusing. Do you really think I couldn't handle that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How amusing. Do you really think I couldn't handle that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How amusing. Do you really think I couldn't handle that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough, Edel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough, Edel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough, Edel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Miss Regina...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Miss Regina...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Miss Regina...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not talk back to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not talk back to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not talk back to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do not wish for any more sacrifices within my estate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do not wish for any more sacrifices within my estate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do not wish for any more sacrifices within my estate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I would appreciate it if the faction withdrew at this point as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I would appreciate it if the faction withdrew at this point as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I would appreciate it if the faction withdrew at this point as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After all, wasn't your goal to accelerate the omen phenomenon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: After all, wasn't your goal to accelerate the omen phenomenon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: After all, wasn't your goal to accelerate the omen phenomenon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If so, you've already achieved what you wanted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If so, you've already achieved what you wanted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If so, you've already achieved what you wanted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As expected of you, Regina. A wise decision.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As expected of you, Regina. A wise decision.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As expected of you, Regina. A wise decision.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, bye-bye, everyone!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well then, bye-bye, everyone!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well then, bye-bye, everyone!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you win the next Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you win the next Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you win the next Qliphoth Game.
